title: Ghost Jedi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:GhostJedi-XWingRogueSquadron6.jpg|thumb|250px|Ghost Jedi performing in [[Hologram/Legends|holo]] at [[The Soundmound]].]]

'''Ghost Jedi''' was a [[Band/Legends|band]] from [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] that became very popular following the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The name was in honor of the late [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Taj Junak]]. Their [[Music/Legends|music]] was written by [[Rorax Falken]], including "[[Soldier's Life is a Sorry Thing]]," and performed by his students.

In addition, the members of the band were secretly Falken's confidantes and served as his henchmen during his involvement in the [[Phantom Project]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 5|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 5]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]]
